steps.title: Identify what action legitimacy requires
steps.content: The passage says legitimacy "cannot be understood without a corollary understanding of the factors that allowed the monarch to ______ his right to hold the throne." The blank must name an action that establishes or reinforces the monarch's claim to power.

steps.title: Test each choice
steps.content:
• A. disengage — means to withdraw or detach from something; this is the opposite of supporting a claim.
  • B. annotate — means to add notes or commentary to a text; it doesn't describe establishing legitimacy.
  • C. buttress — means to strengthen or prop up, which is exactly the action a monarch takes to secure his right to the throne.
  • D. reciprocate — means to return something in kind; it requires a prior action from someone else and doesn't fit the context of establishing a claim.
That confirms C is correct.
